sentences.translation: Čuo sam poslovicu: «Lijepa riječ je sadaka».
sentences.translationEn: I heard the proverb: «A kind word is charity».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ الْكَلَامَ الْحَسَنَ يُفَرِّحُ الآخَرِينَ.
sentences.translation: To znači da lijepe riječi raduju druge.
sentences.translationEn: This means that kind words bring joy to others.

sentences.translation: Hišam je rekao svom kolegi: «Ti si marljiv učenik».
sentences.translationEn: Hisham said to his classmate: «You are a hard-working student».

sentences.translation: Kolega se nasmiješio i osjetio sreću.
sentences.translationEn: The classmate smiled and felt happy.
